title: Senior Radiologist at Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies:
Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
